root_cause: Volume attachment to node is failing, blocking Pod startup
evidence: FailedAttachVolume events persist for the scheduled Pod
Attach failures are not classified as explicit multi-attach or device conflicts
Dominant attach error: AttachVolume.Attach failed for volume "pvc-09ab8c7d6e5f4a32" : timed out waiting for the condition

causes.message: Volume cannot be attached to the target node
AttachDetach controller repeatedly retries volume attachment
Volume not available on node, preventing container startup
Pod cannot start because required volume is not attached

pod:ledger-db-0: Pod blocked waiting for volume attachment to complete

likely_causes: Cloud provider failed to attach disk (quota, API error, or timeout)
Node is not reachable or not ready for volume attachment
Zone or topology mismatch between node and volume
CSI attacher or backend keeps timing out
